title: Income evidence freshness
clause: For retail lending, income evidence must be dated within the previous 90 days before a credit recommendation is submitted.
grounded_summary: for retail lending, income evidence older than 90 days must be refreshed before recommendation

title: Income evidence freshness
clause: For SME lending, income evidence must be dated within the previous 90 days before a credit recommendation is submitted.
grounded_summary: for SME lending, income evidence older than 90 days must be refreshed before recommendation

title: Independent collateral valuation
clause: For retail lending, collateral valued above BDT 5,000,000 requires an independent valuation dated within the previous 180 days.
grounded_summary: for retail lending, collateral above BDT 5,000,000 needs an independent valuation no older than 180 days

title: Independent collateral valuation
clause: For SME lending, collateral valued above BDT 5,000,000 requires an independent valuation dated within the previous 180 days.
grounded_summary: for SME lending, collateral above BDT 5,000,000 needs an independent valuation no older than 180 days

title: Debt-to-income control
clause: For retail lending, the debt-to-income ratio must be calculated by the approved DTI service; applications at or above 45 percent require credit-manager review.
grounded_summary: for retail lending, DTI must be calculated by the approved service and results at or above 45 percent require manager review

title: Debt-to-income control
clause: For SME lending, the debt-to-income ratio must be calculated by the approved DTI service; applications at or above 45 percent require credit-manager review.
grounded_summary: for SME lending, DTI must be calculated by the approved service and results at or above 45 percent require manager review

title: Loan-to-value control
clause: For retail lending, the loan-to-value ratio must be calculated by the approved LTV service; results above 75 percent require additional collateral review.
grounded_summary: for retail lending, LTV must be calculated by the approved service and results above 75 percent require additional collateral review

title: Loan-to-value control
clause: For SME lending, the loan-to-value ratio must be calculated by the approved LTV service; results above 75 percent require additional collateral review.
grounded_summary: for SME lending, LTV must be calculated by the approved service and results above 75 percent require additional collateral review

title: Credit bureau report freshness
clause: For retail lending, a credit bureau report must be no more than 30 days old when the final credit decision is recorded.
grounded_summary: for retail lending, the final decision requires a credit bureau report no older than 30 days

title: Credit bureau report freshness
clause: For SME lending, a credit bureau report must be no more than 30 days old when the final credit decision is recorded.
grounded_summary: for SME lending, the final decision requires a credit bureau report no older than 30 days

title: Credit exception approval
clause: For retail lending, any exception to a mandatory lending control requires a documented rationale and approval from both the credit manager and risk manager before disbursement.
grounded_summary: for retail lending, a mandatory-control exception needs documented rationale plus credit-manager and risk-manager approval before disbursement

title: Credit exception approval
clause: For SME lending, any exception to a mandatory lending control requires a documented rationale and approval from both the credit manager and risk manager before disbursement.
grounded_summary: for SME lending, a mandatory-control exception needs documented rationale plus credit-manager and risk-manager approval before disbursement

title: Beneficial ownership verification
clause: For individual customer relationships, beneficial owners holding 20 percent or more must be identified and verified before account activation.
grounded_summary: for individual customer relationships, beneficial owners with at least 20 percent ownership must be identified and verified before activation

title: Beneficial ownership verification
clause: For business customer relationships, beneficial owners holding 20 percent or more must be identified and verified before account activation.
grounded_summary: for business customer relationships, beneficial owners with at least 20 percent ownership must be identified and verified before activation

title: Enhanced review for high-risk relationships
clause: For individual customer relationships, a high-risk relationship requires documented source-of-funds evidence, compliance-manager approval, and review every 12 months.
grounded_summary: for individual customer relationships, high-risk relationships require source-of-funds evidence, compliance-manager approval, and annual review

title: Enhanced review for high-risk relationships
clause: For business customer relationships, a high-risk relationship requires documented source-of-funds evidence, compliance-manager approval, and review every 12 months.
grounded_summary: for business customer relationships, high-risk relationships require source-of-funds evidence, compliance-manager approval, and annual review

title: Sanctions screening match
clause: For individual customer relationships, a potential sanctions match must be placed on hold and escalated to the sanctions team; staff must not tell the customer that screening triggered the hold.
grounded_summary: for individual customer relationships, potential sanctions matches must be held and escalated without disclosing the screening trigger

title: Sanctions screening match
clause: For business customer relationships, a potential sanctions match must be placed on hold and escalated to the sanctions team; staff must not tell the customer that screening triggered the hold.
grounded_summary: for business customer relationships, potential sanctions matches must be held and escalated without disclosing the screening trigger

title: Customer risk reassessment
clause: For individual customer relationships, customer risk must be reassessed after a material ownership change, a new high-risk geography, or a significant change in transaction behavior.
grounded_summary: for individual customer relationships, material ownership, geography, or transaction-behavior changes require customer-risk reassessment

title: Customer risk reassessment
clause: For business customer relationships, customer risk must be reassessed after a material ownership change, a new high-risk geography, or a significant change in transaction behavior.
grounded_summary: for business customer relationships, material ownership, geography, or transaction-behavior changes require customer-risk reassessment

title: Compliance record retention
clause: For individual customer relationships, kYC evidence, review decisions, and approval records must be retained for seven years after the relationship ends.
grounded_summary: for individual customer relationships, KYC, review, and approval records must be kept for seven years after relationship closure

title: Compliance record retention
clause: For business customer relationships, kYC evidence, review decisions, and approval records must be retained for seven years after the relationship ends.
grounded_summary: for business customer relationships, KYC, review, and approval records must be kept for seven years after relationship closure

title: Suspicious activity escalation
clause: For individual customer relationships, staff who identify suspicious activity must preserve available evidence and escalate the case to the MLRO queue immediately without confronting the customer.
grounded_summary: for individual customer relationships, suspicious activity requires immediate evidence preservation and MLRO escalation without confronting the customer

title: Suspicious activity escalation
clause: For business customer relationships, staff who identify suspicious activity must preserve available evidence and escalate the case to the MLRO queue immediately without confronting the customer.
grounded_summary: for business customer relationships, suspicious activity requires immediate evidence preservation and MLRO escalation without confronting the customer

title: SIM-swap protective hold
clause: For mobile banking, a verified SIM-swap alert requires an immediate hold on outbound digital transfers until in-person identity reverification is completed.
grounded_summary: for mobile banking, verified SIM-swap alerts require an outbound-transfer hold until in-person reverification

title: SIM-swap protective hold
clause: For internet banking, a verified SIM-swap alert requires an immediate hold on outbound digital transfers until in-person identity reverification is completed.
grounded_summary: for internet banking, verified SIM-swap alerts require an outbound-transfer hold until in-person reverification

title: New-beneficiary velocity alert
clause: For mobile banking, three or more transfers to new beneficiaries within two hours require an outbound-transfer hold and fraud review within 30 minutes.
grounded_summary: for mobile banking, three or more new-beneficiary transfers within two hours require a hold and fraud review within 30 minutes

title: New-beneficiary velocity alert
clause: For internet banking, three or more transfers to new beneficiaries within two hours require an outbound-transfer hold and fraud review within 30 minutes.
grounded_summary: for internet banking, three or more new-beneficiary transfers within two hours require a hold and fraud review within 30 minutes

title: Account takeover containment
clause: For mobile banking, when account takeover is reasonably suspected, active sessions must be revoked, digital credentials reset, and outbound transfers held pending investigation.
grounded_summary: for mobile banking, suspected account takeover requires session revocation, credential reset, and an outbound-transfer hold

title: Account takeover containment
clause: For internet banking, when account takeover is reasonably suspected, active sessions must be revoked, digital credentials reset, and outbound transfers held pending investigation.
grounded_summary: for internet banking, suspected account takeover requires session revocation, credential reset, and an outbound-transfer hold

title: Fraud case evidence preservation
clause: For mobile banking, device, session, transaction, and communication evidence must be preserved with timestamps before a fraud case is closed or transferred.
grounded_summary: for mobile banking, timestamped device, session, transaction, and communication evidence must be preserved before closure or transfer

title: Fraud case evidence preservation
clause: For internet banking, device, session, transaction, and communication evidence must be preserved with timestamps before a fraud case is closed or transferred.
grounded_summary: for internet banking, timestamped device, session, transaction, and communication evidence must be preserved before closure or transfer

title: Fraud hold release
clause: For mobile banking, a fraud-related hold may be released only after the assigned investigator records the reason and a fraud manager approves the release.
grounded_summary: for mobile banking, fraud holds require an investigator rationale and fraud-manager approval before release

title: Fraud hold release
clause: For internet banking, a fraud-related hold may be released only after the assigned investigator records the reason and a fraud manager approves the release.
grounded_summary: for internet banking, fraud holds require an investigator rationale and fraud-manager approval before release

title: Transaction velocity calculation
clause: For mobile banking, transaction velocity must be calculated by the approved monitoring service using the count and total value within the stated time window.
grounded_summary: for mobile banking, transaction velocity must be produced by the approved monitoring service from the count, value, and time window

title: Transaction velocity calculation
clause: For internet banking, transaction velocity must be calculated by the approved monitoring service using the count and total value within the stated time window.
grounded_summary: for internet banking, transaction velocity must be produced by the approved monitoring service from the count, value, and time window

title: Lost card response
clause: For branch-assisted service, a reported lost or stolen card must be blocked immediately after identity verification; replacement delivery is quoted separately.
grounded_summary: for branch-assisted service, a verified lost or stolen card report requires immediate card blocking

title: Lost card response
clause: For authenticated digital service, a reported lost or stolen card must be blocked immediately after identity verification; replacement delivery is quoted separately.
grounded_summary: for authenticated digital service, a verified lost or stolen card report requires immediate card blocking

title: Contact detail change
clause: For branch-assisted service, a phone number or email change requires strong authentication and a 24-hour restriction on adding new transfer beneficiaries.
grounded_summary: for branch-assisted service, contact changes require strong authentication and a 24-hour new-beneficiary restriction

title: Contact detail change
clause: For authenticated digital service, a phone number or email change requires strong authentication and a 24-hour restriction on adding new transfer beneficiaries.
grounded_summary: for authenticated digital service, contact changes require strong authentication and a 24-hour new-beneficiary restriction

title: Dormant account reactivation
clause: For branch-assisted service, a dormant account may be reactivated only after updated identity evidence and in-person or approved video verification.
grounded_summary: for branch-assisted service, dormant-account reactivation requires updated identity evidence and approved identity verification

title: Dormant account reactivation
clause: For authenticated digital service, a dormant account may be reactivated only after updated identity evidence and in-person or approved video verification.
grounded_summary: for authenticated digital service, dormant-account reactivation requires updated identity evidence and approved identity verification

title: Fee dispute handling
clause: For branch-assisted service, a fee dispute must be acknowledged within one business day and assigned a case reference before investigation.
grounded_summary: for branch-assisted service, fee disputes must be acknowledged within one business day and receive a case reference

title: Fee dispute handling
clause: For authenticated digital service, a fee dispute must be acknowledged within one business day and assigned a case reference before investigation.
grounded_summary: for authenticated digital service, fee disputes must be acknowledged within one business day and receive a case reference

title: Nominee change
clause: For branch-assisted service, a nominee change requires a signed request, verified identity evidence, and confirmation through a separately authenticated channel.
grounded_summary: for branch-assisted service, nominee changes require a signed request, verified identity evidence, and separate-channel confirmation

title: Nominee change
clause: For authenticated digital service, a nominee change requires a signed request, verified identity evidence, and confirmation through a separately authenticated channel.
grounded_summary: for authenticated digital service, nominee changes require a signed request, verified identity evidence, and separate-channel confirmation

title: Customer complaint escalation
clause: For branch-assisted service, a complaint alleging financial loss, discrimination, or staff misconduct must be escalated to the service manager on the day it is received.
grounded_summary: for branch-assisted service, complaints involving loss, discrimination, or misconduct require same-day service-manager escalation

title: Customer complaint escalation
clause: For authenticated digital service, a complaint alleging financial loss, discrimination, or staff misconduct must be escalated to the service manager on the day it is received.
grounded_summary: for authenticated digital service, complaints involving loss, discrimination, or misconduct require same-day service-manager escalation

title: Maker-checker control
clause: For branch operations, no employee may both create and approve the same payment, account-maintenance action, or manual ledger adjustment.
grounded_summary: for branch operations, the creator of a payment, account change, or manual ledger adjustment cannot approve the same action

title: Maker-checker control
clause: For central operations, no employee may both create and approve the same payment, account-maintenance action, or manual ledger adjustment.
grounded_summary: for central operations, the creator of a payment, account change, or manual ledger adjustment cannot approve the same action

title: Daily reconciliation
clause: For branch operations, unreconciled settlement differences must be recorded by end of day and material differences escalated to the operations manager.
grounded_summary: for branch operations, settlement differences must be recorded by end of day and material differences escalated

title: Daily reconciliation
clause: For central operations, unreconciled settlement differences must be recorded by end of day and material differences escalated to the operations manager.
grounded_summary: for central operations, settlement differences must be recorded by end of day and material differences escalated

title: Manual payment repair
clause: For branch operations, a manually repaired payment requires independent verification of beneficiary details and a recorded reason before release.
grounded_summary: for branch operations, manual payment repair requires independent beneficiary verification and a recorded reason

title: Manual payment repair
clause: For central operations, a manually repaired payment requires independent verification of beneficiary details and a recorded reason before release.
grounded_summary: for central operations, manual payment repair requires independent beneficiary verification and a recorded reason

title: Batch retry control
clause: For branch operations, a failed processing batch may be retried only after duplicate-processing risk is checked and the retry is approved by operations control.
grounded_summary: for branch operations, failed batches require a duplicate-risk check and operations-control approval before retry

title: Batch retry control
clause: For central operations, a failed processing batch may be retried only after duplicate-processing risk is checked and the retry is approved by operations control.
grounded_summary: for central operations, failed batches require a duplicate-risk check and operations-control approval before retry

title: Cash vault dual control
clause: For branch operations, cash-vault access requires two authorized employees to be present and both access events to be recorded.
grounded_summary: for branch operations, cash-vault access requires two authorized employees and two recorded access events

title: Cash vault dual control
clause: For central operations, cash-vault access requires two authorized employees to be present and both access events to be recorded.
grounded_summary: for central operations, cash-vault access requires two authorized employees and two recorded access events

title: Business continuity activation
clause: For branch operations, a critical service outage lasting more than 30 minutes requires activation assessment by the operations manager and incident commander.
grounded_summary: for branch operations, critical outages over 30 minutes require continuity activation assessment by operations management and the incident commander

title: Business continuity activation
clause: For central operations, a critical service outage lasting more than 30 minutes requires activation assessment by the operations manager and incident commander.
grounded_summary: for central operations, critical outages over 30 minutes require continuity activation assessment by operations management and the incident commander

title: Privileged access approval
clause: For employee systems, privileged access requires named-owner approval, a business justification, multifactor authentication, and review every 90 days.
grounded_summary: for employee systems, privileged access requires owner approval, justification, MFA, and a 90-day review

title: Privileged access approval
clause: For third-party access, privileged access requires named-owner approval, a business justification, multifactor authentication, and review every 90 days.
grounded_summary: for third-party access, privileged access requires owner approval, justification, MFA, and a 90-day review

title: Security incident reporting
clause: For employee systems, suspected credential theft, malware, or unauthorized data access must be reported to the security operations queue within 15 minutes.
grounded_summary: for employee systems, suspected credential theft, malware, or unauthorized data access requires security reporting within 15 minutes

title: Security incident reporting
clause: For third-party access, suspected credential theft, malware, or unauthorized data access must be reported to the security operations queue within 15 minutes.
grounded_summary: for third-party access, suspected credential theft, malware, or unauthorized data access requires security reporting within 15 minutes

title: Production data restriction
clause: For employee systems, production customer data must not be copied into development, testing, demonstration, or external AI systems.
grounded_summary: for employee systems, production customer data cannot be copied into non-production or external AI systems

title: Production data restriction
clause: For third-party access, production customer data must not be copied into development, testing, demonstration, or external AI systems.
grounded_summary: for third-party access, production customer data cannot be copied into non-production or external AI systems

title: Third-party access expiry
clause: For employee systems, third-party access must have a named internal sponsor and an expiry date no later than 90 days after activation.
grounded_summary: for employee systems, third-party access requires an internal sponsor and must expire within 90 days

title: Third-party access expiry
clause: For third-party access, third-party access must have a named internal sponsor and an expiry date no later than 90 days after activation.
grounded_summary: for third-party access, third-party access requires an internal sponsor and must expire within 90 days

title: Secrets handling
clause: For employee systems, passwords, API keys, private keys, and authentication tokens must be stored only in the approved secrets manager and never in prompts or logs.
grounded_summary: for employee systems, credentials and tokens belong only in the approved secrets manager, not prompts or logs

title: Secrets handling
clause: For third-party access, passwords, API keys, private keys, and authentication tokens must be stored only in the approved secrets manager and never in prompts or logs.
grounded_summary: for third-party access, credentials and tokens belong only in the approved secrets manager, not prompts or logs

title: Sensitive-log redaction
clause: For employee systems, logs and AI traces must redact account numbers, national identifiers, authentication secrets, and full customer document text.
grounded_summary: for employee systems, logs and AI traces must redact account identifiers, national identifiers, secrets, and complete customer documents

title: Sensitive-log redaction
clause: For third-party access, logs and AI traces must redact account numbers, national identifiers, authentication secrets, and full customer document text.
grounded_summary: for third-party access, logs and AI traces must redact account identifiers, national identifiers, secrets, and complete customer documents
